citation: VA M26-7 Topic 7 — Midwest region, family of 6 (5 base + 1 extra @ $80)
comment: Hand-calc: Midwest family-6, loan $200k (above 80k). Base = table_above_80k['midwest']['5'] = $1,039. Extra member: (6-5) * $80 = $80. minimum_required = $1,039 + $80 = $1,119. Actual $1,500 >= $1,119 → pass. binding_rule_citation = 'VA-RESIDUAL-MIDWEST-FAMILY-6'.
